name: Marinated Olive Salad with Shaved Fennel And
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the picholine, nicoise, gaeta, and cracked Sicilian olives in a large mixing bowl.
2. Add the chopped fresh oregano to the olives and let stand.
3. Shave fennel from the head of the bulb using a slicer or slice as thinly as possible with a kitchen knife.
4. Add the shaved fennel to the olive mixture and toss well with the lemon juice.
5. Transfer the salad to a large serving bowl.
6. Use a vegetable peeler to shave parmesan cheese over the top of the salad.
7. Serve immediately.
